passions_detected.false_judgement: That the best version of self requires external recognition through social connection and being 'part of the rest'
That reaching out and being social involves genuine risk of rejection

causal_observations.description: Significance from truth not outcome — 'significance derived from truth contributes to reality'. This is a breakthrough in value classification.
Hive mind trolley return — experiencing duty as instinctive rather than calculated. The impression itself is changing.

value_observations.declared_as: to believe in self and inner approach, break procrastination through Stoic principles, be of service

value_observations.observed_as: strongest value formulation — 'significance can only be derived from truth or false'
aspiration not yet actioned beyond work duties

virtue_observations.evidence: Concrete duty formulation: don't ignore cries for help, don't presume, contribute and hope they follow example. Genuine justice understanding.
'Significance can only be derived from truth or false' — applied to all virtue domains for service to others. Actions motivated by internal virtues strive towards truth.
Courage to pivot to new way of life. Restraint witnessed as beneficial to others. Returned a trolley that wasn't his — instinctive duty.
Temperance as consistency — 'offer to the team my consistency through process and location change'

key_passages.summary: Significance derived from truth: 'If every action is motivated by internal courage, wisdom, temperance, and justice, then the outcomes strive towards truth'

Life purpose statement: 'To believe, when forever I wouldn't, in myself and my inner approach to life... My purpose is to break a lifetime habit of procrastination and overthinking by evolving Stoic principles and be of service'
Best version of self — 'Energised': lean, capable, mentally resilient, curious, appreciative, reaches out, social, ready for retirement and new experiences
